claim_boundary: Deterministic diagnostic hierarchical paired analysis over the checksum-pinned successor release input. It does not alter frozen metrics or support or promote a benchmark, release, paper, or dissertation claim; result interpretation and claim promotion remain blocked pending separate human review.

claim_gate.reason: analysis executed over successor rows; claim promotion requires human review of the deterministic report

protocol_conformance.declared_delivery: paired risk-difference and odds-risk-ratio table on matched cells
predeclared planner-pair and family-comparison multiplicity table
near-miss exposure normalization summary by time, distance, and opportunity
machine-readable claim gate and protocol conformance table
